generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our current security laws hold back our ability to protect citizens. The 2024 Boston incident showed what happens when agencies can't share intelligence fast enough. We need to update our domestic security powers - not to infringe on rights, but to give professionals the tools they need to stop threats before they escalate. Countries like Germany and Japan have already modernized their frameworks with strong oversight. It's time we do the same. #NationalSecurity #PublicSafety
